name: kyverno
explanation: Kyverno controllers (Admissions, Backup, Cleanup, Reports) each expose Prometheus-formatted metrics at `/metrics` on the well-known port 8000. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 with no extra config beyond the standard openmetrics template; the README's autodiscovery snippet is `http://%%host%%:8000/metrics`. No authentication is required. Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port).
notes: Multiple controller pods may need to be discovered separately (each emits its own metrics on :8000), but per-pod the discovery shape is identical.
